This release is bigger than a typical patch: a P0 decode-correctness fix ships alongside a wave of feature-additive surface across the Rust SDK and the Python bindings. Every addition is backward-compatible — no method signatures change, no types are removed, no client code needs to migrate — so the patch-level version reflects that existing callers continue to compile unchanged while new opt-in paths open.

See the [v8.0.2 entry in the structured changelog](https://github.com/userFRM/ThetaDataDx/blob/v8.0.2/CHANGELOG.md#802---2026-04-21) for the full list.

## Fixed

- **P11 — `stock_history_trade_quote` / `option_history_trade_quote` silently returned `Ok(vec![])` on non-empty responses.** The v3 MDDS server emits the combined-row pair as `trade_timestamp` / `quote_timestamp`; `tick_schema.toml` declared them as `ms_of_day` / `quote_ms_of_day` with no aliases. `find_header` failed both required-header guards and the parser short-circuited before decoding any row. Aliases added; verified against a fresh prod capture (AAPL `stock_history_trade_quote` returns 955 237 rows).
- **Decoder audit** — generator template + `parse_option_contracts_v3` now raise `DecodeError::MissingRequiredHeader` when the `DataTable` carries rows but declares none of the expected columns. Empty responses (holiday with no trades) still return `Ok(vec![])`.

## Added

- **Async Python surface** — every historical endpoint gains an `_async` companion awaitable.
- **Fluent builders** — `tdx.<endpoint>_builder(...)` with chainable setters and `.list()` / `.arrow()` / `.pandas()` / `.polars()` terminals plus `_async` companions.
- **`decode_response_bytes(endpoint, chunks)`** — generator-emitted `#[pyfunction]` feeding recorded frames through the Rust decoder.
- **Layered exception hierarchy** — `ThetaDataError` root plus nine leaves mapped from every `thetadatadx::Error` variant.
- **Python logging bridge** — `tracing_subscriber::Layer` forwarding to `logging.getLogger(target)`.
- **Slice-based Arrow fast path** — builder `.arrow()` / `.pandas()` / `.polars()` terminals feed the decoder-owned `Vec<tick::T>` straight into Arrow column builders.
- **`RetryPolicy`** — full jitter on retriable gRPC statuses.
- **Session auto-refresh** — `auth::SessionToken` with version-check dedup on concurrent 401s.
- **Environment-variable config matrix** — `THETADATA_MDDS_HOST`, `THETADATA_MDDS_PORT`, `THETADATA_NEXUS_URL`, `THETADATA_FPSS_HOST`, `THETADATA_FPSS_PORT`, `THETADATA_CLIENT_TYPE`.
- **Optional `metrics-prometheus` cargo feature** — HTTP `/metrics` exporter wired inside `ThetaDataDx::connect`.
- **Vendor docstring lift** — 60 endpoint docstrings threaded through one generator SSOT. See `docs/ATTRIBUTION.md`.
- **`split_date_range(start, end)`** — pure Rust 365-day splitter for the auto-chunk pre-flight.
- **Capture fixtures** — seven `tests/fixtures/captures/` pairs anchoring row counts, header lists, and first-row values.

## Changed

- **SDK surfaces regenerated** — `historical_methods.rs`, `tick_arrow.rs`, `decode_bench.rs` rebuilt off the merged generator. Byte-identical `--check` passes.
- **Parser generator hardened** — raises `MissingRequiredHeader` on schema drift instead of silent `Ok(vec![])`.

## Changed

- Every Rust crate version bumps `8.0.1 → 8.0.2`: `thetadatadx`, `thetadatadx-ffi`, `thetadatadx-cli`, `thetadatadx-server`, `thetadatadx-mcp`, `thetadatadx-py`, `thetadatadx-napi`.
- `sdks/typescript/package.json` + every platform subpackage under `sdks/typescript/npm/` bumps to `8.0.2` so the npm dependency graph stays coherent.
- `tdbe` stays at `0.11.0` (no API change in this release — all new surface lives in `thetadatadx` and its downstream SDKs).
